rationale: Builds directly on the current projection-only gentle clipping winner but pivots away from more offset and midpoint experiments, which have recently regressed. The new change keeps a late EMA over only the projection matrices that still end up int8-quantized after the first quant-aware roundtrip, then reapplies the exact final roundtrip before save. That targets the real score by smoothing the noisiest quantization-sensitive weights without increasing artifact bytes or disrupting the hot training path for most of the run.
title: Late Projection EMA Finalizer
